promo.spinWinDesc: Complete 300 real-money spins (from €0.2 bets) and unlock your Daily Wheel of Fortune reward! The mission updates daily — spin, complete, and win!

desc.welcome: Your welcome offer is split over two days of wager-free fun. Get up to 20% cashback on day one, and unlock up to 25% on day two!

faq.howReferralSystemWorks_title: How does the referral system work?
faq.howReferralSystemWorks_desc: Once you join the GoldRiders, you'll receive a unique referral link. Share this link across your channels — website, blog, social media, or email. When someone clicks your link, registers, and starts playing or depositing, you earn a commission based on their activity. Tracking is automatic and real-time via your dashboard.
